title: Add SSH Key for Secure Mittwald Access
description: User wants to add their SSH public key to their Mittwald account for secure server access.
prompt: I want to set up SSH key authentication for my mittwald account. I have my public key ready. Can you show me my current SSH keys and then add a new one? My public key is ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIExample... developer@laptop Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.

successCriteria.description: SSH keys listed or user info retrieved
